name: David Hazeltine
abstract: David Perry Hazeltine (born October 27, 1958) is an American jazz pianist, composer, arranger, and educator.

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Hayes
about_quotes.evidence: Riley Mullins is the trumpeter, and Abraham Burton, he plays tenor saxophone, and Santi Debriano, he’s the bassist, and Dave Hazeltine, he’s the pianist.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louis Hayes interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Giacomo Gates
about_quotes.evidence: It was David Hazeltine on piano... And there were several Monk tunes on the record... I show up and I see Ben Riley... We’re doing “Epistrophy”
about_quotes.doc_title: Giacomo Gates interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 29, 2015 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: David Hazeltine, the great pianist, he played with Eddie for a bit.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 25, 2002
